name: ProcessRptExtr_EE

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT r.SUBJ_CD, r.SRC_SYS_CD, r.TRGT_SYS_CD, r.STRT_DTM, r.END_DTM, c.DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, CONVERT(DECIMAL(18,6), DATEDIFF(SECOND, r.STRT_DTM, r.END_DTM))/86400 AS DURATION, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY r.STRT_DTM) AS NUMBERROW FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC r JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_BTCH_CYC b ON r.BTCH_CYC_SK=b.BTCH_CYC_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLNDR_DT c ON b.BTCH_CYC_DESC=c.CLNDR_DT_SK WHERE r.SUBJ_CD='@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AND r.TRGT_SYS_CD='@{pipeline().parameters.TargetSys}' AND r.SRC_SYS_CD='@{pipeline().parameters.SourceSys}' AND r.RUN_CYC_NO=@{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} ORDER BY r.STRT_DTM), cte_value AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, STRT_DTM, END_DTM, DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, NUMBERROW, LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST(DURATION AS VARCHAR(50)))) AS DUR_STRING FROM cte_main), cte_string AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, STRT_DTM, END_DTM, DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, NUMBERROW, '000000'+DUR_STRING AS Value FROM cte_value), cte_pos AS (SELECT *, CHARINDEX('.', Value) AS PerPos FROM cte_string), cte_substring AS (SELECT *, SUBSTRING(Value, PerPos-2, 2) AS DurationSec, SUBSTRING(Value, PerPos-4, 2) AS DurationMin, SUBSTRING(Value, PerPos-6, 2) AS DurationHrs FROM cte_pos), cte_formatted AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, STRT_DTM, END_DTM, DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, NUMBERROW, CASE WHEN DurationHrs='00' THEN '' WHEN LEFT(DurationHrs,1)='0' THEN RIGHT(DurationHrs,1) ELSE DurationHrs END AS StringDurationHrs, DurationMin FROM cte_substring), cte_final AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, STRT_DTM, END_DTM, DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, NUMBERROW, CASE WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(StringDurationHrs)))=0 THEN '00' WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(StringDurationHrs)))=1 THEN '0'+LTRIM(RTRIM(StringDurationHrs)) ELSE LTRIM(RTRIM(StringDurationHrs)) END AS StringDurationHrsFormatted, CASE WHEN DurationMin='00' THEN '' WHEN LEFT(DurationMin,1)='0' THEN RIGHT(DurationMin,1) ELSE DurationMin END AS StringDurationMin FROM cte_formatted), cte_final2 AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, STRT_DTM, END_DTM, DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, NUMBERROW, StringDurationHrsFormatted, CASE WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(StringDurationMin)))=0 THEN '00' WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(StringDurationMin)))=1 THEN '0'+LTRIM(RTRIM(StringDurationMin)) ELSE LTRIM(RTRIM(StringDurationMin)) END AS StringDurationMinFormatted FROM cte_final), cte_final3 AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, STRT_DTM, END_DTM, DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, NUMBERROW, StringDurationHrsFormatted+':'+StringDurationMinFormatted AS TIME_DURATION FROM cte_final2) SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, STRT_DTM, END_DTM, DAY_OF_WK_FULL_NM, TIME_DURATION, @{pipeline().parameters.RowCount} AS ROW_COUNT FROM cte_final3 ORDER BY STRT_DTM

Write out processing statistics to file

Job Name:
IdsEdwProcessRptExtr
Select data from P_RUN_CYC table based on job parameters
Records are appended to file
/ids/prod/scripts/log/processing_rpt.dat
